scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,blue "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $c = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8000 -State Listen); if ($c.Count) { foreach ($x in $c) { Write-Host ('[port-clear] killing PID ' + $x.OwningProcess + ' on port 8000'); taskkill /F /T /PID $x.OwningProcess | Out-Null }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } else { Write-Host '[port-clear] port 8000 is free' }" && cd backend && .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --env-file .env
scripts.dev:frontend: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference='SilentlyContinue'; $c = @(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen); if ($c.Count) { foreach ($x in $c) { Write-Host ('[port-clear] killing PID ' + $x.OwningProcess + ' on port 8080'); taskkill /F /T /PID $x.OwningProcess | Out-Null }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500 } else { Write-Host '[port-clear] port 8080 is free' }" && npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:bash: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c green,blue "bash backend/start.sh" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
